fixes: Created useFocusTrap hook for modal focus management
Modal component has built-in focus trapping and Escape close
All button/input elements have proper aria-labels
result.summary: Implemented core accessibility improvements: skip-to-content link, main landmark role, focus trap hook, keyboard shortcuts system with overlay (?), Modal component with built-in focus trapping. All interactive elements have proper aria attributes. Build passes with 0 errors.
